summary: TWO_COLUMN: a single complex plane on the left whose vertical and horizontal strip-grid lines morph via ValueTracker s into the image grid under z↦eᶻ — verticals smoothly bend into circles |w|=eˣ, horizontals into radial rays arg w=y. Right column has live s, the interpolant w=(1-s)z+seᶻ, and the |eᶻ| / arg(eᶻ) identities.
